exercises.title: Find the Wrong Answer
exercises.content: Three students calculated acceleration. Who got the right units? A) 5 m/s, B) 10 m/s², C) 8 kg

exercises.title: Unit Check Your Own Answer
exercises.content: Calculate F = 10 kg × 2 m/s². Write out your answer with units. Is it in kg·m/s² or kg·m/s or kg·m?
